---
id: execute-device-trait
title: "通过 Trait 控制设备"
description: "通过 Trait 控制设备，包括如下操作："
sidebar_label: "通过 Trait 控制设备"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-api/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"通过 Trait 控制设备"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/trait/execute"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



通过 Trait 控制设备，包括如下操作：
- 更新属性（如开关、温度等，functionCode 与 traitCode 请调用 /devices/definitions 接口查询）
- 更换设备所在房间（functionCode="EndpointLabel", traitCode="EndpointRoom"）
- 改名（functionCode="EndpointLabel", traitCode="EndpointName"）


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["data"],"properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","traitCode","value"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点 ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码，如：\n- Output（开关控制）\n- EndpointLabel（设备改名/更换房间）\n"},"traitCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能点代码，如：\n- OnOff（开关）\n- EndpointRoom（设备所在房间）\n- EndpointName（设备名称）\n"},"value":{"description":"要设置的目标值。值类型与待控制 trait 的 parameter.type 保持一致。","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"}},"title":"TraitExecuteItem"}}},"title":"TraitExecuteRequest"},"examples":{"executeOnOff":{"value":{"data":[{"deviceId":"123456","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output","traitCode":"OnOff","value":true}]}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功，但不代表所有 trait value 设置成功。<br />code 为 0 表示至少部分成功；code 不为 0 表示全部失败。<br/>若 data 存在，表示为设置失败的 trait 集合，若无则全部成功。","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","description":"data 集合元素为执行失败的 trait 数据","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","traitCode","code","message"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点 offline"}]},"title":"TraitExecuteResponse"},"examples":{"partialFailed":{"value":{"type":"ExecuteTraitResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7ecf7","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"123456","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output","traitCode":"OnOff","code":1103,"message":"device
